verdict: REFUTED — sign - OPPOSITE claim +, ATT=-0.1715, p=3.34e-05, N=397, treated_countries=1
verdict_reason: sign - OPPOSITE claim +, ATT=-0.1715, p=3.34e-05, N=397, treated_countries=1
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if Callaway-Sant'Anna ATT on log GDP per capita over the 5-year and 10-year post-accession horizons is positive and significant at p<0.05, AND ATT on trade-openness is positive and significant. PARTIAL if openness rises but growth gap is insignificant — common-market access raised trade but did not measurably accelerate convergence. REFUTED if the ATT on log GDP-per-capita is negative or wrong-signed at p<0.05.

estimate.method: Callaway-Sant'Anna TWFE fallback (linearmodels failed: No module named 'linearmodels')
